lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: I am the leader of the White Knights of Falador. Why do you seek my audience?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seek a quest.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well, I need some spy work doing but it's quite dangerous. It will involve going into the Black Knights' fortress.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I laugh in the face of danger!

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well that's good. Don't get too overconfident though.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: You've come along at just the right time actually. All of my knights are already known to the Black Knights.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Subtlety isn't exactly our strong point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you just take your White Knights' armour off? They wouldn't recognise you then!

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: I am afraid our charter prevents us using espionage in any form, that is the domain of the Temple Knights.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Temple Knights? Who are they?

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: That information is classified. I am forbidden to share it with outsiders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... what do you need doing?

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well, the Black Knights have started making strange threats to us; demanding large amounts of money and land, and threatening to invade Falador if we don't pay them.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Now, NORMALLY this wouldn't be a problem...

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: But they claim to have a powerful new secret weapon.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Your mission, should you decide to accept it, is to infiltrate their fortress, find out what their secret weapon is, and then sabotage it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Good luck! Let me know how you get on. Here's the dossier for the case, I've already given you the details.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Oh. You don't appear to have any room for the dossier in your inventory. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm not ready to do that.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Come see me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I go and cower in a corner at the first sign of danger!

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Err....

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: I... suppose spy work DOES involve a little hiding in corners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. I suppose I'll give it a go then.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: You've come along at just the right time actually. All of my knights are already known to the Black Knights.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't, I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Ok. Please don't break anything.

sections.title: Speaking to Sir Amik Varze again

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: How's the mission going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't managed to find what the secret weapon is yet...

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well, keep at it! Falador's future is at stake!

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Here's the dossier on the case.

sections.title: Trying to open the main door to the fortress
Trying to open the sturdy door while not wearing a disguise

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Hey! You can't come in here! This is a high security military installation!

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Well, this is the guards' entrance. I might be new here but I can tell you're not a guard.

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: You're not even wearing proper guards uniform!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh pleeeaaase let me in!

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Go away. You're getting annoying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is this uniform?

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Well you can see me wearing it. It's an iron chainbody and a medium bronze helm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm... I wonder if I can make that or get some in the local towns....

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: What was that you muttered?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, nothing important!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Don't let it happen again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So who does it belong to?

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: This fortress belongs to the order of Black Knights known as the Kinshra.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Okay, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to the guards while not wearing a disguise

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Get lost. This is private property.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but I work here!

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Well, this is the guards' entrance. I might be new here but I can tell you're not a guard.

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: You're not even wearing proper guards uniform!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh pleeeaaase let me in!

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Go away. You're getting annoying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is this uniform?

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Well you can see me wearing it. It's an iron chainbody and a medium bronze helm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm... I wonder if I can make that or get some in the local towns....

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: What was that you muttered?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, nothing important!

sections.title: Talking to the guards while wearing a disguise

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Hey! Get back on duty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh...

lines.speaker: Black Knight
lines.text: Die intruder!

lines.speaker: Black Knight Captain
lines.text: So... how's the secret weapon coming along?

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: The invincibility potion is almost ready...

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: It's taken me FIVE YEARS, but it's almost ready.

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: Greldo the Goblin here is just going to fetch the last ingredient for me.

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: It's a specially grown cabbage grown by my cousin Helda who lives in Draynor Manor.

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: The soil there is slightly magical and it gives the cabbages slight magical properties....

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: ...not to merntion the trees!

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: Now remember Greldo, only a Draynor Manor cabbage will do! Don't get lazy and bring any old cabbage, THAT would ENTIRELY wreck the potion!

lines.speaker: Greldo
lines.text: Yeth, Mithreth.

sections.title: Reporting back to Sir Amik Varze

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: How's the mission going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found out what the Black Knight's secret weapon is. It's a potion of invincibility.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: A potion of invincibility? That is grave news indeed. If you can sabotage it somehow, you will be very well paid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So when I finish this mission for you can I be a white knight? Can I wear your armour too?

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: I am afraid I cannot authorise you to become a white knight unless under a situation of dire circumstance. Assisting us on a freelance basis will be well worth your time however and you will have my personal gratitude.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't buy stuff with personal gratitude though...

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: There is of course also the financial recompense as I said.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok! I'll get on to sabotaging that potion.

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: I wouldn't go in there if I were you. Those Black Knights are in an important meeting. They said they'd kill anyone who went in there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I won't.

lines.speaker: Fortress Guard
lines.text: Wise move.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't care. I'm going in anyway.

sections.title: Using any item on the hole, or a cabbage before overhearing the witch

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why exactly would I want to do that?

sections.title: Using a Draynor cabbage on the hole

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not supposed to be HELPING the witch you know...

sections.title: Using a normal cabbage on the hole

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: Where has Greldo got to with that magic cabbage!

lines.speaker: Black Knight Captain
lines.text: What's that noise?

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: Hopefully Greldo with the cabbage... yes, look here it co....NOOOOOoooo!

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: My potion!

lines.speaker: Black Knight Captain
lines.text: Oh boy, this doesn't look good!

lines.speaker: Black Cat
lines.text: Meow![1]

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like my work here is done. Seems like that's successfully sabotaged their little secret weapon plan.

sections.title: Listen-at Grill after ruining the potion

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: It's RUINED! All that work, FIVE years down the drain, who was it! I'll find them and when I do....

lines.speaker: Black Knight Captain
lines.text: Erm.. maybe we can save some of it?

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: SAVE some of it? Are you mad!? That cabbage was a normal cabbage, it spoilt the whole thing and now I have to start all over again!

lines.speaker: Black Knight Captain
lines.text: No need to... get upset... you're scaring the cat.

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: 'The CAT'? She's not 'THE CAT'!

lines.speaker: Witch
lines.text: She's Maemi... aren't you dear....

lines.speaker: Black Cat
lines.text: Purrr....[1]

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have ruined the Black Knights' invincibility potion. That should put a stop to your problem and an end to their little schemes.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Yes, we have just received a message from the Black Knights saying they withdraw their demands, which would seem to confirm your story.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now I believe there was some talk of a cash reward...

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Absolutely right. Please accept this reward.
